problem id: 99ff46bb
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(5) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  11111101 -> 10011111
  00010001 -> 00100100
  00001001 -> 00100010
  11010001 -> 00010100
  01100101 -> 10111001
  10011011 -> 01000110
  01001000 -> 00010010
  00001010 -> 01000010
  11000001 -> 00010000
  10111010 -> 01101110

query: 00010111
predicted answer: 11100101
